APP_URL.purpose: Base URL for links in emails

meta.description: Authentication and authorization matrix for EvidLY app

provides.profile: UserProfile from user_profiles table (with optional org override)
provides.loading: boolean â€” true until initial auth check completes
provides.isEvidlyAdmin: boolean â€” true if user email ends with @getevidly.com
provides.isAdmin: boolean â€” true if isEvidlyAdmin OR profile.role === 'platform_admin'
provides.signUp: (email, password, fullName, phone, orgName, state, kitchenType) => Promise
provides.setOrgOverride: (orgId | null) => void â€” overrides profile.organization_id for emulation

security_behaviors.suspension_enforcement: If user_profiles.is_suspended is true, immediately signs out and redirects to /suspended
security_behaviors.login_timestamps: Updates last_login_at (and first_login_at on first login) in user_profiles

provides.setUserRole: (role) => void â€” only works in demo mode (no-op in preview mode)
provides.isPreviewMode: boolean â€” true when __rolePreview URL param is active
provides.roleLocationAssignments: Record<UserRole, LocationAssignment[]> â€” demo location map
provides.tempCoverageAssignments: TempCoverageAssignment[] â€” temporary location coverage grants

role_sync.authenticated_user: Role is synced from profile.role via dbRoleToUserRole()
role_sync.demo_mode: Role is stored in localStorage key 'evidly-demo-role'
role_sync.preview_mode: __rolePreview URL param locks role for the page lifecycle

provides.isDemoMode: boolean â€” anonymous demo (no session), forced true in __rolePreview
provides.isAuthenticatedDemo: boolean â€” user has session AND org.is_demo === true
provides.enterDemo: (lead?) => void â€” clears auth tokens, sets sessionStorage
provides.exitDemo: () => void â€” clears sessionStorage demo flags
provides.companyName: string â€” from lead or default 'Pacific Coast Dining'
provides.userName: string â€” from lead or default 'Maria Rodriguez'
provides.firstName: string â€” first word of userName
provides.presenterMode: boolean â€” activated by typing 'evidly' or ?presenter=true

storage_keys.evidly_demo_mode: sessionStorage â€” 'true' when anonymous demo is active
storage_keys.evidly-presenter: sessionStorage â€” 'true' when presenter mode is active

guard_mode_sync.platform_admin: always 'live' â€” full write access even when org is_demo

behavior.platform_admin: Always returns true â€” bypasses all route restrictions
behavior.prefix_matching: Routes ending with '/' use startsWith; others match exact or exact + '/'
behavior.unlisted_routes: Routes not in ROUTE_ROLE_MAP return true for all authenticated users
behavior.empty_array: Routes with [] as allowed roles are only accessible to platform_admin

behavior.demo_mode: Allows through (admin pages have write guards separately)
behavior.non_admin: Redirects to /dashboard, logs to platform_audit_log, shows error toast

RequireAdmin.admin_check: useAuth().isAdmin â€” true if email ends @getevidly.com OR role === 'platform_admin'

behavior.no_session_qr_entry: Renders children with guest banner (method=qr_scan or equipment param)

role_route_matrix.description: For each route in ROUTE_ROLE_MAP: true = allowed, false = denied. platform_admin always allowed (bypasses all). Routes not listed are accessible to all authenticated users.

role_capability_matrix.description: Non-route capabilities derived from RoleContext helper functions

route_matching_precedence.description: ROUTE_ROLE_MAP is evaluated top-to-bottom. First match wins. Specific routes (e.g., /admin/vendor-connect with []) are listed BEFORE general prefix matches (e.g., /admin/ with [owner_operator, executive]).

deactivation.auto_cleanup: When user authenticates, rawDemoMode is set to false and sessionStorage keys are removed

write_guard_modes.live: Full write access (default for authenticated non-demo users; always for platform_admin)

behavior.guest_with_qr: Renders with yellow 'Scanning as guest' banner (method=qr_scan or equipment param present)

security_notes.suspension: AuthContext checks is_suspended on every profile fetch; signs out immediately if true and redirects to /suspended
security_notes.platform_admin_bypass: platform_admin bypasses ALL route guards in isRouteAllowedForRole(); also bypasses demo write guards (always 'live' mode)
security_notes.org_emulation: setOrgOverride() in AuthContext allows platform_admin to override profile.organization_id for cross-org support
security_notes.role_preview: __rolePreview URL param lets admin preview any role; locks role for page lifecycle, forces demo mode on
security_notes.first_match_wins: ROUTE_ROLE_MAP is iterated in order; specific routes must appear before their prefix catch-all to avoid being shadowed

08-onboarding.summary: Comprehensive audit of signup, onboarding, demo wizard, guided tour, demo data generation, and demo mode lifecycle across the EvidLY platform.

fields.name: password
fields.validation: min 12 chars, 1 upper, 1 lower, 1 number, 1 special

db_write.deferred_writes: Org/profile/access INSERTs deferred to EmailConfirmed.tsx where confirmed session exists

signup_paths.pricing_tier_selection: No tier selection on Signup.tsx; all signups start as trial. FounderBanner shows countdown to FOUNDER_PRICING_DEADLINE (August 7, 2026).
signup_paths.post_submit: Shows 'Check Your Email' confirmation screen with email address and 'try again' button

signup_paths.purpose: Post-signup location count selection and pricing display

location_types.description: 11+ locations, custom pricing, shows contact info

pricing_display.savings_calculation: Shows monthly savings, annual savings, and percentage

steps.name: Welcome

steps.name: Org Details
steps.content: Informational - says org is already set up, continue with locations

db_write.condition: Only if not isDemoMode and locationName is provided

steps.jurisdiction_lookup: lookupJurisdiction() called on address, best-effort, non-blocking

steps.content: Temperature monitoring setup from industry templates

db_write.condition: Only if teamEmail provided and not isDemoMode

steps.name: QR Codes

onboarding.demo_mode_behavior: In demo mode, updateOnboardingStep/completeOnboarding/saveChecklistItems are no-ops. Location insert skipped.
onboarding.resume_behavior: On mount, fetches organizations.onboarding_step and resumes from last saved step. If onboarding_completed=true, redirects to /dashboard.
onboarding.industry_template_integration: Loads from organizations.industry_subtype, maps to INDUSTRY_TEMPLATES key for pre-populated checklist items

visibility_filtering.by_role: Steps can restrict to specific UserRole[] values
visibility_filtering.by_industry: Steps can restrict to IndustryCode[] values
visibility_filtering.by_enrollment: sb1383_setup gated by isSB1383Enrolled, k12_setup gated by isK12Enrolled

onboarding_checklist_card.dependency_system: Steps can declare dependsOn[] - array of step IDs that must be completed first
onboarding_checklist_card.auto_completion: Some steps auto-detect completion via completionTable + completionMinCount or completionProfileField

demo_wizard.current_behavior: BYPASSED - useEffect immediately calls enterDemo() + navigate('/dashboard', { replace: true }). Returns null. The full 7-step wizard code exists below but is unreachable (dead code after 'return null').

dead_code_wizard_steps.label: Your Dashboard
dead_code_wizard_steps.content: Celebration + launch dashboard CTA + free assessment link

lead_capture.note: Unreachable in current code due to early return null

staff_login.purpose: Subtle 'Staff Login' link for sales team, uses supabase.auth.signInWithPassword

step_1.purpose: Sales-qualified demo request form with competitor email blocking
step_1.competitor_blocking: isBlockedDomain(email) checks for competitor and disposable email domains

step_2.purpose: Calendly scheduling page after demo request submission
step_2.note: Calendly widget is a placeholder in current code with 'Simulate Booking' button

demo_expired.purpose: Full-screen upgrade prompt for expired authenticated demo accounts

GuidedTour.purpose: General platform guided tour - highlights top bar and sidebar navigation elements
GuidedTour.trigger: Floating 'Tour' button (bottom-right, z-1040) or programmatic via window event 'evidly:start-guided-tour'
ui_features: Scroll into view on step change

DemoTour.purpose: Demo-specific guided tour focused on compliance features, ends with animated score celebration
ui_features: Last regular step shows 'See Your Score' instead of 'Next'

tour_modules_config.purpose: Single source of truth for ALL EvidLY feature modules - used in guided tour templates and setup form toggles

demo_data_generation.purpose: Client-side in-memory demo data generation for anonymous demo mode (no Supabase writes)

data_categories.excursion_rate: 2-4 predetermined excursion days, 30% chance per equipment per midday shift

data_categories.scoring: Starts at ~72%, improves to ~85% over 30 days with daily variance

data_categories.conditional_insight: inspection_predictions adds health authority cycle insight

demo_data_generation.progress_animation: 200-500ms delay between steps for loading screen effect

demo_mode.override_provider: DemoOverrideProvider (for Role Preview - forces demo mode off for regular layout)

role_preview.purpose: Admin iframe must render tenant layout with demo data

actions: Clears all Supabase auth tokens from localStorage (sb-*-auth-token)
Signs out from Supabase if session exists
If lead provided: stores lead in sessionStorage + starts tour

deactivation.auto_cleanup: When user authenticates while in rawDemoMode, demo state is auto-cleaned (unless in role preview)

actions: Sets organizations.is_demo = false, converted_at = now(), demo_plan = selectedPlan
Deletes demo_generated_data rows linked to demo sessions
conversion.philosophy: Conversion = flip a flag, not a migration. Profile data was always in DB.

modes.live: Full write access (platform_admin always gets this)
modes.anonymous_demo: Write guard active for anonymous demo
modes.authenticated_demo: Write guard active for authenticated demo

demo-account-create.purpose: Creates real Supabase auth account + org + locations for prospect demo

creates.details: email + temp password (12 char UUID slice), auto-confirmed, user_metadata.is_demo=true
If demo_session_id provided, updates with credentials and status=ready

demo-account-create.cleanup_on_failure: Deletes orphaned auth user if any subsequent step fails
demo-account-create.returns: { success, auth_user_id, organization_id, location_ids, credentials, demo_expires_at }

demo-account-convert.purpose: Converts demo account to live paid account
actions: Deletes demo_generated_data rows for linked sessions

cleanup-demo-tour.purpose: Removes all demo data for completed tours and expired partner demos

modes.manual: Pass { tour_id } or { partner_demo_id } to clean specific entity
modes.scheduled: No body = finds all completed tours past cleanup_scheduled_for timestamp

generate-demo-template.purpose: Populates staging demo org with 60 days of realistic data across all pillars
data_generated_per_location: Temperature logs (60 days x 4-5 units, 5% deviation rate)
Corrective actions (4 scenarios: temp deviation, pest control, ice machine, food handler card)
Documents (10 types: permits, certs, food handler cards, insurance)
generate-demo-template.tribal_casino_support: Sets food_safety_mode=advisory with TEHO authority text

generate-partner-demo.purpose: Populates partner demo with curated multi-location data tailored to partner persona

vendor.locations: 5 client restaurants across 3 counties (Merced, Fresno, Stanislaus)
vendor.data: 60 days ops + 12 months hood cleaning service records

tribal_casino.locations: 5-8 casino outlets (Main Buffet, Steakhouse, Sports Bar, etc.)
tribal_casino.data: 60 days ops + monthly hood cleaning + quarterly fire suppression + annual fire extinguisher
tribal_casino.config: tribe_name, casino_name, sovereignty_type, NIGC overlay, fire_compliance stats

observations.finding: The entire 7-step DemoWizard (steps 0-6) is dead code. The component always returns null after the useEffect that calls enterDemo() and navigates to /dashboard. ~400 lines of unreachable UI code remain in the file.

SignupLocations.tsx does not write to DB. It performs client-side pricing calculations and navigates to /onboarding, but the selected location count, billing period, and pricing are NOT persisted or passed to the onboarding page.
Signup defers all org/profile/access DB writes to EmailConfirmed.tsx after email verification. Only user_metadata is stored in the signUp call.
Onboarding step 3 (Add Location) hardcodes state as 'CA' in lookupJurisdiction() call regardless of the user's actual state selection during signup.
DemoSchedule.tsx contains a placeholder Calendly widget with a 'Simulate Booking' button instead of an actual embed. The real Calendly inline widget is not integrated.
Presenter mode can be toggled by typing 'evidly' on the keyboard (konami code) or via ?presenter=true URL param. Session-based persistence.

Two separate tour systems exist: GuidedTour (14 steps, general platform navigation) and DemoTour (6 steps, demo-specific with animated score celebration). GuidedTour is triggered from the floating button or the onboarding checklist. DemoTour is controlled by DemoContext.

Client-side demoDataGenerator.ts generates compliance scores (overall_score, food_safety_ops/docs, facility_safety_ops/docs) which may conflict with CLAUDE.md rule 'Never generate, calculate, blend, or aggregate a compliance score.' However, this is used only in anonymous demo mode, not production.

generate-demo-template and generate-partner-demo edge functions both generate insurance risk scores and compliance data with hardcoded values. All rows are tagged with source='demo_template' or 'partner_demo' for safe cleanup.

The post-signup onboarding checklist (OnboardingChecklistCard) is a completely separate system from the Onboarding.tsx 10-step wizard. The checklist has 20 possible steps with role/industry/tier-based visibility, dependency chains, and auto-completion detection.

DemoRequest form stores data only in sessionStorage, not in Supabase. Comment says 'In a real implementation, this would save to Supabase.' The session ID is generated client-side with Date.now().toString(36).
DemoExpired page preserves profile data and redirects to /pricing for upgrade or Calendly for consultation. No data loss messaging.

orphan_routes.detail: All routes in App.tsx have valid component files via lazy imports.

orphan_pages.detail: All page components referenced by lazy imports in App.tsx appear valid.

items.issue: Exists locally but never deployed. Not invoked from src/ or other edge functions.

orphan_edge_functions.detail: Most edge functions are invoked by other edge functions, webhooks, cron, or external triggers. Only send-welcome-email appears truly orphaned.

db_tables_not_in_code.detail: Tables accessed only by edge functions, RLS policies, or triggers are expected to have no src/ references. Playbook tables and vendor/marketplace/enterprise tables with 0 rows are either used by edge functions or awaiting future features. No action required.

phantom_tables.detail: 61 tables referenced in code (supabase.from() calls) that do not exist in the production database. These will produce runtime RLS or 404 errors.
notes: 'x' is likely a typo or test artifact.
'profiles' should be 'user_profiles' â€” wrong table name in code.
'referrals' is a HoodOps PRO table and must NOT be created in this repo.

missing_env_docs.detail: No .env.example file exists. All environment variables are undocumented. New developers have no reference for required configuration.

role_mismatch.detail: Code roles match DB roles. Code defines 8 roles (platform_admin, owner_operator, executive, compliance_manager, chef, kitchen_manager, facilities_manager, kitchen_staff). Aliases 'admin' and 'owner' map to owner_operator.

jie_baseline.detail: JIE baseline verified. Note: audit spec referenced column 'state_code' but actual column is 'state'. Schema documentation mismatch logged.

items.verdict: NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW â€” purpose unclear, may violate zero-fake-data rule

fake_data_candidates.detail: 5 of 6 candidates are properly gated by isDemoMode. sampleData.ts requires manual review.

deployed_only_functions.detail: 52 edge functions exist on the Supabase server but have no local source code in the repository. This includes critical cron-invoked functions. Local development, review, and disaster recovery are impossible for these functions.

rls_disabled_tables.detail: 7 tables have RLS disabled. Data is publicly readable without row-level security. If any contain sensitive or org-scoped data, this is a security vulnerability.
